title: Property Consultant - Rustomjee Group Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Rustomjee Group Holdings Services - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Rustomjee Group Holdings Services are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Rustomjee Group Holdings Services:
Rustomjee Group Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rustomjee Group Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
